GenAiPlugin.description: Trigger when the MSL seeks emerging adverse-event trends for Immunexis: new case series, disproportionality signals, literature alerts.

genAiPluginInstructions.description:
Pick any 3 from the following, and return with this header in rich text: ###Safety Signal Watch – <today’s date>
Preset Bullet Library - **Case series of dermatologic AEs (n = 12) in JAAD** – summarize incidence vs class. - **EudraVigilance disproportionality: hepatic events slightly ↑** – recommend ongoing monitoring. - **Nessun segnale emergente negli ultimi 30 giorni** – reassure but stay alert. - **Conference abstract hints neuro-toxicity in frail pts** – draft Q&A. - **FDA adds Immunexis to watch list for renal markers** – outline talking points.

GenAiPlugin.scope:
✅ In scope • Mentions of *safety signal, adverse event, AE, FAERS, pharmacovigilanza, nuovi casi, case series*.
🚫 Out of scope • Routine AE reporting procedure (Compliance Checklist) unless tied to new signal.
